role_summary: Joint oral history at the Library of Congress; this catalog page treats the combined transcript as a single embedding signature.
ai_reading: John Dudley et al's top semantic neighbor is Robert L. Carter (entry 108, count 136); the broader cluster includes James Oscar Jones (#57), Gertrude Newsome Jackson (#136), Clarence Magee (#21).
biographical_paragraph: This joint oral history is held at the Library of Congress as entry 64 of the Civil Rights History Project (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. The LoC transcript carries an ingestion-only audit tier: the catalog ingested the transcript but did not subject it to the audit cascade, and any specific biographical or quoted claims should be confirmed against external archives before citation. Independent biographical sourcing for an extended orientation paragraph is pending; the strongest signal currently available is the embedding pattern named in the AI's reading above.
